The '''Dearic Cantina''' was a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] inthe city of [[Dearic/Legends|Dearic]], on the planet [[Talus/Legends|Talus]].<ref name="SWG" />

==History==
[[Mort]] was a regular there. Other patrons were [[Nurla Slinthiss]], the [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] [[Kathikiis Ruwahurr]], [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] employee [[Thom Steele]], and [[Radlee Mathiss]].

[[File:Dearic_Cantina_interior.jpg|thumb|left|Inside the cantina]]
Among the drinks served in this cantina were [[Adumari beer]], [[Lopez Softdrink]], [[Ardees Beverage/Legends|Ardees Beverage tea]], [[Milk/Legends|milk]], and imported [[Utozz]].

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], a group of spacer searching for the missing pilot [[Cal Handro]] met the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] [[Wire]] for information in the cantina.<ref name="SWG:Gc">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=other}}Quest: "Getting closer?"</ref>
